events.name: change
events.description: Will be fired if value has been changed

events.name: items:change
events.description:
Fired when the collection changes. The detail carries the up-to-date,
well-formed set of items (hyphenated prose must survive verbatim).

events.name: snowball
events.description: Snowball event fired when throwing a snowball.

typedefs.name: ChangeDetail
typedefs.description: The event detail described once as a named typedef, then reused via `@event`.
